Project Geoffrey

Follow along as I restore a 1962 Renault Dauphine back to life. From a field-find with questionable rust to (hopefully) a driver, documented one wrench turn at a time.

in progress Suspension

Front Suspension Rebuild

March 5, 2024

1962 Renault Dauphine

Started on the front suspension. Springs replaced, control arm bushings in. Still waiting on ball joints to arrive before I can button it up.

Read more →
🔧
complete Rust Repair

Floor Pan Rust Repair

February 10, 2024

1962 Renault Dauphine

Three weekends of grinding, cutting, and welding to sort out the floor pans. Both sides needed full replacements. Not glamorous work, but it's the foundation everything else sits on.

Read more →

complete Teardown

First Look: Initial Teardown

January 20, 2024

1962 Renault Dauphine

Got the Dauphine into the garage for the first time and spent a full day pulling it apart to understand what I'm actually dealing with.
